title: Site Updates
content:
News for 8/19/25:
Rat paste
Arthur, and Bennett are no longer a part of Rat paste. Tbh they werent doing much and-if anything-pausing progress.
Rowan and I have already started... well, practicing. Don't expect anything TOO substantial at the moment cuz we JUST started playing together
 
Site update
Nothing too major, just a few additions
Changes:
Added now listening to widget
Updated info about Rat Paste
Updated solo music sub-page
Added news
Quality of life improvements
Removed Herobrine
 
It's getting harder to maintain this site, I may swap back to google sites or another builder eventually.
 
Life updates
Unfortunately, school's starting up soon. Any *major* music... things... will take WAY longer
I'm sorta getting better at drumming
 
Anyways, that's it for news.

title: Site redesign and News
content:
Hello everyone.
Major site redesign is here.
I went for an early 2010's style and I hope it turns out well! (I'm writing this before the full design)
 
Music Updates:
As of recent, I've been obsessed with Go Hang's earlier music (Trinity Demo, Gone Hung, and Devil Trials). I actually managed to find the amp model used on those records and scored one, It's a Line 6 Flextone II HD. Guitar center didn't have the II used when I bought mine, but they did have the original Flextone HD somewhere in Texas.
I plan on modeling it with NAM and doing my own cabs based off of songs like Cyst, Hell Calling, Dust, and Arson.
 
Rat Paste:
A little birdie told me Rat Paste may be dropping their first song sometime in Mid march to early April. The same birdie played the tune on it's government issued speaker and I can confirm-It is a banger.
 
Anyways, that's basically it. Rock on!
